intro: The cryptocurrency and decentralized finance sectors faced a concentrated wave of attacks between April 12 and April 24, 2026, with 17 articles documenting 14 high-severity and 3 critical incidents. Key threat actors observed include Lazarus Group, FakeWallet, and Omnistealer, while the single recorded vulnerability was CVE-2023-4863. The global impact spanned the United States, Canada, Europe, and North America, affecting finance, financial-services, and software development sectors.
